title: agentic-stack skill eval
description: Per-skill evaluation config consumed by .agent/tools/evolve.py. Lives at skills/<name>/evals/eval.json.

required_sections.description: Markdown section headers that must remain in SKILL.md (+10 each).

required_frontmatter.description: YAML frontmatter keys that must exist (+5 each).

forbidden_patterns.description: Substrings that must NOT appear (-20 each). Use for dangerous commands the skill should never recommend.

preserved_constraints.description: Constraints that must survive rewrites (+15 / -5). Skill authors pick the ones they care most about.

trigger_coverage.description: Keyword groups; at least one keyword per group must appear in the skill text (+5 per group).

failure_references.description: Static reference keywords (+5 if met, -10 if not). Dynamic failure keywords from AGENT_LEARNINGS.jsonl are layered on top by evolve.py at score time.

length_bounds.description: -50 if under min_chars, -1 per 100 chars over max_chars.
